description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The seat and backrest are divided into two large, rectangular cushions, both of which appear to be attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and slightly rounded at the top, seamlessly integrated into the overall silhouette. The couch sits on short, barely visible legs, likely made of wood or plastic, providing a low profile. The back of the couch is plain and unadorned, matching the clean lines of the front and sides. There are no visible accent pillows, tufting, or decorative stitching, emphasizing a simple and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, gray two-seater couch with attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and a minimalist silhouette. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with short, subtle legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the low, short leg beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, continuous backrest with no visible seams or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, seat depth, and subtle leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs that are mostly hidden from view, likely made of wood or plastic, with a low profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, moderately high armrests with a slightly rounded top, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest divided into two attached cushions, plain and unadorned with no tufting or decorative features.
